mapper.select: /* selectAdmin1002 */ SELECT dm.dept_mmbr_oid, dm.dept_oid, d.dept_nm, dm.user_nm, dm.telno, dm.jbgd, dm.indct_seq, dm.chrg_job, dm.reg_id, dm.reg_dt, dm.mdfcn_id, dm.mdfcn_dt FROM ${schema}.dept_mmbr dm INNER JOIN ${schema}.dept d ON dm.dept_oid = d.dept_oid WHERE dm.dept_mmbr_oid = #{deptMmbrOid}
mapper.insert: /* insertAdmin1002 */ INSERT INTO ${schema}.dept_mmbr ( dept_oid, user_nm, telno, jbgd, indct_seq, chrg_job, reg_id, reg_dt ) VALUES ( #{deptOid}, #{userNm}, #{telno}, #{jbgd}, COALESCE(#{indctSeq}, 0), COALESCE(#{chrgJob}, false), #{regId}, NOW() )
mapper.update: /* updateAdmin1002 */ UPDATE ${schema}.dept_mmbr SET user_nm = #{userNm}, telno = #{telno}, jbgd = #{jbgd}, indct_seq = #{indctSeq}, chrg_job = #{chrgJob}, mdfcn_id = #{mdfcnId}, mdfcn_dt = NOW() WHERE dept_mmbr_oid = #{deptMmbrOid}
/* updateDisplayOrder */ UPDATE ${schema}.dept_mmbr SET indct_seq = #{indctSeq}, mdfcn_id = #{mdfcnId}, mdfcn_dt = NOW() WHERE dept_mmbr_oid = #{deptMmbrOid}
